Description: Use Forte Rules Engine for vesting-style lockups and blacklist enforcement while leaving transfer sizing unrestricted.

CallingFunctions.Name: transfer
CallingFunctions.EncodedValues: address from, address to, uint256 value, uint256 blockTime, uint256 fromUnlockTime, uint256 fromBlacklistFlag, uint256 toBlacklistFlag, uint256 treasuryBypass, uint256 maxTransfer

CallingFunctions.Name: transferFrom
CallingFunctions.FunctionSignature: transferFrom(address from, address to, uint256 value)
CallingFunctions.EncodedValues: address from, address to, uint256 value, uint256 blockTime, uint256 fromUnlockTime, uint256 fromBlacklistFlag, uint256 toBlacklistFlag, uint256 treasuryBypass, uint256 maxTransfer

Rules.Name: Transfer Blacklist Check
Rules.Description: Block transfers that involve blacklisted addresses.

Rules.Name: Transfer Lockup Check
Rules.Description: Prevent transfers before the sender unlock time unless treasury bypass is active.

Rules.Name: TransferFrom Blacklist Check
Rules.Description: Block transferFrom calls that involve blacklisted addresses.

Rules.Name: TransferFrom Lockup Check
Rules.Description: Prevent transferFrom before unlock time unless treasury bypass is active.
